title: PromQL rate and counters
description: rate() and increase() compute per-second and total change of counters, handling resets, over a window.
body: Use when querying counter metrics in PromQL. rate() returns the per-second average increase of a counter over the range window and transparently handles counter resets; increase() gives the total over the window. They require a counter and a window spanning several scrape samples. Do not apply rate() to a gauge or use a window near the scrape interval. Actions: pick a window of at least four intervals and confirm the metric type. Validation signals include a stable, gap-free rate. Risk boundary: a too-short window silently yields empty results, blinding alerts that depend on it.
